articles.title: Allianz Global Investors in talks to acquire UOB Asset Management for $467M
articles.description:
The acquisition could reshape Southeast Asia's asset management landscape, enhancing AllianzGI's regional influence and setting valuation benchmarks.
The post Allianz Global Investors in talks to acquire UOB Asset Management for $467M appeared first on Crypto…
articles.content: The German asset management giant outbid KKR, Amundi, and Seviora to enter exclusive negotiations for UOB's investment arm, signaling a major push into Southeast Asia. Allianz Global Investors, the i… [+2305 chars]
